goal: Add a neutral Bluepilot review-suite entrypoint while keeping the legacy Builder adapter suite command as a compatibility wrapper.
claims: BP-029 adds tools/test-bluepilot-review-suite.cjs as the neutral shared review entrypoint.
BP-029 keeps tools/test-builder-adapter-review-suite.cjs working as a compatibility wrapper.
BP-029 does not change runtime tools, fixtures, docs, package metadata, or external integration behavior.
assumptions: The suite now covers Builder adapter, Builder read probe, and Phase Scanner checks.
Keeping the old command avoids breaking existing review habits.
No package script change is required for this block.
dod: tools/test-bluepilot-review-suite.cjs exists and runs all existing shared checks.
Both old and new suite commands exit 0.
stop_conditions: Live Builder, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, or external system behavior becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-027 and BP-028 made the old Builder adapter review suite cover Phase Scanner behavior too.
